creator: meka@tilda.center
text:
Take your time. Unwrap the presents, first! :o)

Anyway, I do get this:
WARN: Makefile: no port directory /usr/ports/devel/py-future@py27 found, even though it is listed in RUN_DEPENDS.

I know FLAVORS is a new thing, but I can't figure out what is that warning really telling me (I expect to not find @py27 directories in ports). Any tips?
